meta.label: URL Slug
meta.help: URL-friendly identifier — the page's route segment under /builder

meta.label: Home page
meta.help: The site's ★ home page (LayoutDocument isHome) — exactly one per site

meta.label: Builder board
meta.help: The page's builder canvas, source of truth the builder edits: candidate layout nodes (each a LayoutTree) + canvas positions, the ★ page node id, and region pins (top|bottom|main). The real page render ASSEMBLES from this: pinned-top nodes → sticky top bar, pinned-bottom → sticky bottom bar, the ★ node's tree → scrolling main.
